components.value: S, DF , and you sound like your normal self when you speak. You can cast this spell while in animal form, using animal -appropriate somatic . description.value: When you’re in the form of an animal (such as when you are using wild shape or are affected by a polymorph effect), you can speak normally, including when you cast spells with verbal
